title: Visual Identity Guidelines
scenario: Create a set of visual identity guidelines for a new fashion brand. The target artifact is a short paragraph that outlines the brand's color palette, typography, and logo usage.
constraints: Must use proper branding terminology like 'color scheme' and 'typography'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the guidelines are under 100 words and use proper branding terminology.
Evaluate the tone of the guidelines, ensuring they're professional and clear.
Verify that the guidelines accurately outline the brand's color palette, typography, and logo usage.
